past_challenges.raw: Junior year I hit a wall completely. I was doing research, taking five upper-division classes, and trying to maintain my GPA for grad school apps. I stopped enjoying anything I used to love and just felt like I was going through the motions.

I had no idea whether to pursue grad school, continue my research project, or just find a job. Every advisor gave me a different answer and I spent weeks paralyzed by indecision. Talking to older students who had been through it was the only thing that actually helped.
